name: Propose a new source
about: Suggest a vet school or institution to add to the scrape list

labels: new-source
assignees: ''
---

<!-- Thanks for suggesting a new source. The more institutions we cover, the more useful VetTrials gets. -->

## Institution

- **Name:**
- **Country / State:**
- **Type:** [ ] Vet school  [ ] Teaching hospital  [ ] Specialty hospital  [ ] Registry  [ ] Other:

## Where their trials are listed

- **URL of the public clinical-trials page:**
- **Approximate number of active trials (if you know):**

## Page characteristics (best guesses are fine)

- [ ] Static HTML — trials visible on initial page load
- [ ] JavaScript-rendered — page is empty without JS
- [ ] Multiple sub-pages (e.g. one per species or condition)
- [ ] Has pagination or "load more" buttons
- [ ] Behind any kind of login, captcha, or geographic restriction (if so, we probably can't scrape it)
- [ ] Language other than English

## Anything else we should know

<!-- Quirks, alternate URLs, contact at the institution we should email, etc. -->
